name: pippit-video
description: Manage Pippit accounts and create, inspect, locally save, preview, and regenerate video jobs through one MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Manage accounts and generate Pippit video
interface.longDescription: Use the bundled Pippit MCP server to securely enroll and select facade-managed Access Keys, list video models, submit asynchronous generation or reference-guided regeneration jobs, automatically save completed MP4 files, and preview them through the MCP Apps local resource bridge without exposing absolute paths.
defaultPrompt: List the available Pippit video models
Add or switch the Pippit account used for new video jobs
Generate a Pippit video from this prompt and reference URL
Regenerate this completed Pippit video using the selected range and annotations as guidance
Check my Pippit video job and preview it when complete
